result.stdout:
TranslateTool v0.1.106.0
Copyright © 2014-2021 Topten Software. All Rights Reserved

Usage: translatetool [<command>] [<options>]

Commands:
    extract      extracts strings from C# files
    update       updates a translated file with newly extracted strings
    translate    machine translates any untranslated strings
    list         lists strings from a translation file
    trim         removes JSON attributes not required at runtime
    convert      converts old style JSON file to new

Options:
  --help         show this help, or help for a command
  --version      show version information

result.stdout:
TranslateTool v0.1.106.0
Copyright © 2014-2021 Topten Software. All Rights Reserved

Usage: translatetool extract [Options] <filespec>

Options:
  --t           Extract translatable .T() strings
  --nt          Extract non-translatable strings
  --regex:<rx>  Extract strings matching regex (use \C to match C# style string)
  --vs          Output strings in Visual Studio `filename(line): string` format
  --json        Output in JSON format
  --locations   Include locations in JSON output
  --fileheader  Output source file name header
  --raw         Don't escape output strings
  --out:<file>  Output to file instead of stdout
  --help        Show this help screen

result.stdout:
TranslateTool v0.1.106.0
Copyright © 2014-2021 Topten Software. All Rights Reserved

Usage: translatetool list [Options] <filename>

Options:
  --todo          List strings that need attention (no translation or machine == true
  --done          List strings that have been translated and checked (translated and machine == false)
  --help          Show this help screen

Lists strings from a translation file.

result.stdout:
TranslateTool v0.1.106.0
Copyright © 2014-2021 Topten Software. All Rights Reserved

Usage: translatetool translate [Options] <filename>

Options:
  --help          Show this help screen
  --redo          Also re-translate existing machine translations
  --all           Re-translate all strings
  --apikey:key    Google Translate API key
  --language:iso  The target language (if not specified, expects filename in format strings-xx.json)

This command machine translates the specified file.

result.stdout:
TranslateTool v0.1.106.0
Copyright © 2014-2021 Topten Software. All Rights Reserved

Usage: translatetool update [Options] <sourcefile> <targetfile>

Options:
  --no-locations  Don't copy location information
  --no-trim       Don't delete no longer used strings
  --help          Show this help screen

This command updates the target file with any phrases in the source file
that don't exist in the target file.
